prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford 427 SOHC 'Cammer' (FE-series, 7.0L V8) with forged internals (Manley 4340 steel crank, Eagle H-beam rods, JE 12.5:1 forged pistons), ported and polished heads by CHI Cylinder Heads, and a custom billet camshaft (Comp Cams 427S-108-8 with 0.650" lift, 280° duration). Paired with a Holley Dominator 1250 CFM carburetor on an Edelbrock Victor Jr. intake manifold, tuned for 650+ HP on 110-octane race fuel.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission with a McLeod twin-disc clutch (RST 10.5" diaphragm), Ford 9" rear end with a Detroit Locker differential, and 3.70:1 gearing. Custom driveshaft by Inland Empire Driveline (3.5" chrome-moly) with Spicer 1350 U-joints for durability under high torque.

Suspension overhaul with Global West Total Control Products front coilovers (adjustable valving, 2.5" springs) and a four-link rear setup with Ridetech ShockWave air springs (for adjustable ride height). Braking system upgraded to Baer 6P 14" rotors with 6-piston calipers up front and 4-piston calipers in the rear, paired with Hawk DTC-60 brake pads and Goodridge stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Full custom bodywork by Ringbrothers: hand-formed steel widebody kit (3.5" flares front/rear) with a one-off carbon fiber hood (functional scoop for the 427 SOHC) and rear ducktail spoiler. Painted in a custom-mixed BASF Glasurit 'Midnight Teal' with gold leaf pinstriping by Steve Demosthenes.

Interior reimagined with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard (custom stitching by Katzkin), Recaro SRD bucket seats (retrimmed in black Nappa leather with red contrast stitching), and a custom roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point, mild steel, powder-coated gloss black). Steering wheel replaced with a Nardi Classic 380mm wood-rim wheel on a Flaming River tilt column.

Wheel setup: 17x9" and 17x11" front/rear Billet Specialties Vintec II wheels (custom offset for widebody fitment) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 295/35/17 rear). Custom billet aluminum wheel spacers (1.25" front, 1.5" rear) by HRE Performance for perfect stance.
